content.speakerText: There’s a $150 graduation fee—paid online via the student portal.
content.speakerTextCn: 有150美元毕业费，需通过学生门户在线支付。

options.text: Can I pay with cash at the office?
Can I pay in installments? I’m short on cash right now.
How much is the tuition fee?

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了支付方式的灵活性问题，符合场景中‘确认是否可分期’的使用说明。选项1错误，因为对话明确要求在线支付，不接受现金；选项3和4与费用支付无关，属于偏离主题的提问。

content.speakerText: Payment confirmation takes 24 hours—don’t wait till the last minute.
content.speakerTextCn: 支付确认需24小时，别拖到最后一刻。

options.text: Can I pay using a credit card?
So I should pay by the 13th to be safe?
Is there a discount for early payment?
Who should I contact if I have questions?

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了对‘预留24小时处理时间’的理解，主动确认截止日期，符合使用说明。选项1虽合理，但未回应时间紧迫性；选项3和4与‘避免延误’的核心提醒无关。

content.speakerText: The graduation fee is non-refundable once processed.
content.speakerTextCn: 费用一旦处理，将不予退还。

options.text: Can I get a receipt after payment?
Can I pay next week instead?
Why is the fee so high?

content.explanation: 正确答案是合理且礼貌的后续问题，符合支付后确认流程。选项2试图推迟支付，与‘非退款’前提冲突；选项3和4属于无关或抱怨性提问，不符合专业沟通场景。
